loadData() - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.panels.DashboardPanel
Loads transaction data for the selected account, applies filters, and populates the table with the resulting transactions and a running balance.

Loads the spreadsheet data into Java objects using JXLS ReaderIntf.
